hero.title: AI Image Transition Video Effect
hero.subtitle: Upload a start and end image to create a smooth cinematic transition between scenes.

features.title: Start + End Frames
features.description: Upload two images and the AI generates the motion in between for seamless transitions.

features.title: Smooth Cinematic Motion
features.description: Create natural camera movement and consistent lighting across the transition.

features.title: Perfect for Storytelling
features.description: Connect scenes, create time-lapses, or morph environments with a single effect.

steps.title: 1. Upload Start Image
steps.description: Choose the first frame of your transition.

steps.title: 2. Upload End Image
steps.description: Select the final frame to transition into.

steps.title: 3. Generate and Share
steps.description: Create your transition video and download instantly.

items.question: Do I need two images?
items.answer: Yes. This effect requires a start and an end frame to build the transition.

items.question: What formats are supported?
items.answer: JPG, PNG, and WebP images up to 10MB each.

items.question: Can I control the duration?
items.answer: Yes. Choose between 5s and 8s durations in the settings.

seo.title: AI Image Transition Effect | Veo3 AI
seo.description: Create smooth AI-powered transitions between two images with cinematic motion.
